lesson: When searching for a pattern, use one broad Grep before narrowing. Multiple sequential search calls on the same target signals thrashing.
Files read 3+ times per session should be summarised to a scratchpad early. Context compaction deletes the content but not the need for it.
Sessions exceeding 50 tool calls should delegate independent work to background agents earlier. Context pressure increases with every call.

After 3 failures (syntax error unexpected token), resolution came from switching from Edit to Read. When hitting this error pattern, try changing tools or targets rather than retrying the same approach.
